name: on-stop
summary: End-of-turn reminders — surface uncommitted count, last touched file, optional memory-session-summary nudge.
when_to_use: Projects where you want end-of-turn visibility without blocking. Lighter than task-completed-quality-gate.
script:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
printf 'Turn end: %s\n' "$(date '+%H:%M')" >&2
U=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ' || echo 0)
[ "$U" -gt 0 ] && printf 'Reminder: %s uncommitted files\n' "$U" >&2
L=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | head -1 || true)
[ -n "$L" ] && printf 'Last touched: %s\n' "$L" >&2
echo '{"decision":"approve"}'
verify: Finish a turn with uncommitted changes; reminder appears in stderr.
